name: Can Bash Save the Day?
statement:
Whoa! You did a great job helping Team Rocket who managed to capture all the Pokemons sent by Bash. Meowth, part of Team Rocket, having already mastered the human language, now wants to become a master in programming as well. He agrees to free the Pokemons if Bash can answer his questions.
Initially, Meowth gives Bash a weighted tree containing n nodes and a sequence a1,вЂ‰a2...,вЂ‰an which is a permutation of 1,вЂ‰2,вЂ‰...,вЂ‰n. Now, Mewoth makes q queries of one of the following forms:
вЂў  1 l r v: meaning Bash should report , where dist(a,вЂ‰b) is the length of the shortest path from node a to node b in the given tree.
вЂў  2 x: meaning Bash should swap ax and axвЂ‰+вЂ‰1 in the given sequence. This new sequence is used for later queries.
Help Bash to answer the questions!
input:
The first line contains two integers n and q (1вЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰nвЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰2В·105, 1вЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰qвЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰2В·105)В вЂ” the number of nodes in the tree and the number of queries, respectively.
The next line contains n space-separated integersВ вЂ” the sequence a1,вЂ‰a2,вЂ‰...,вЂ‰an which is a permutation of 1,вЂ‰2,вЂ‰...,вЂ‰n.
Each of the next nвЂ‰-вЂ‰1 lines contain three space-separated integers u, v, and w denoting that there exists an undirected edge between node u and node v of weight w, (1вЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰u,вЂ‰vвЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰n, uвЂ‰в‰ вЂ‰v, 1вЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰wвЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰106). It is guaranteed that the given graph is a tree.
Each query consists of two lines. First line contains single integer t, indicating the type of the query. Next line contains the description of the query:
вЂў  t = 1: Second line contains three integers a, b and c (1вЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰a,вЂ‰b,вЂ‰cвЂ‰<вЂ‰230) using which l, r and v can be generated using the formula given below:
вЂў  ,
вЂў  ,
вЂў  .
вЂў  t = 2: Second line contains single integer a (1вЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰aвЂ‰<вЂ‰230) using which x can be generated using the formula given below:
вЂў  .
The ansi is the answer for the i-th query, assume that ans0вЂ‰=вЂ‰0. If the i-th query is of type 2 then ansi = ansiвЂ‰-вЂ‰1. It is guaranteed that:
вЂў  for each query of type 1: 1вЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰lвЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰rвЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰n, 1вЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰vвЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰n,
вЂў  for each query of type 2: 1вЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰xвЂ‰в‰¤вЂ‰nвЂ‰-вЂ‰1.
The  operation means bitwise exclusive OR.
output: For each query of type 1, output a single integer in a separate line, denoting the answer to the query.
note:
In the sample, the actual queries are the following:
вЂў  1 1 5 4
вЂў  1 1 3 3
вЂў  2 3
вЂў  2 2
вЂў  1 1 3 3
